data.name: MILF LOVE - Spa Date
data.detailed_description:
MILF LOVE - Spa Date is an erotic visual novel where you play as Selena, a stunning futanari babe who stumbles onto a suspicious link... and lands on a dating app packed with thirsty MILFs.

One swipe later, she matches with Evelyn, a seductive librarian with curves to die for, and their flirty chat quickly turns into a steamy spa date.

But things get complicated. Public spa rules mean no funny business... at least, not at first.

And when Roxy, a bold influencer, crashes the scene, things heat up even more.

Surrounded by horny women eager for new adventures, Selena is about to find out that what happens at the spa... stays at the spa.

Bored and in need of a thrill, Selena finds herself on a MILF-filled dating app and dives right in.

One match later, she's off to meet Evelyn for a sensual spa rendezvous.

Let's just say... Selena isn't planning to play it safe.

Evelyn is a classy librarian with a naughty side. Drawn to Selena's bold profile, she doesn't waste time setting up a date.

Behind her refined taste and stunning curves is a woman who knows exactly what she wants, and how to get it.

Like fine wine, Evelyn only gets better with age... and she knows it!

Roxy is a spicy influencer and stops by the spa to leave a review on her socials. However, she runs into Selena and Evelyn mid-date.

Instead of stepping aside, Roxy dives right into the action... literally.

Content is king, and Roxy always delivers.

Natalie owns the spa and welcomes new customers like family. Her greetings are warm... sometimes a little too warm.

Running a business has its drawbacks, like not being able to join in on all the fun.

But being surrounded by sexy, naked customers? Not the worst downside.

◆ Features

◇ Erotic story with over 40,000 words (3-4 hours of gameplay)

◇ Plenty of spicy scenes to ignite your senses (perfect for one-handed play!)

◇ 4 steamy girls who only get hornier with time

◇ 4K high-quality graphics

◇ Over 250 unique CGs

◇ 28 fully animated erotic scenes

◇ Detailed 3D backgrounds with multiple variations

◇ Scene replay, music room, and image gallery

◇ Achievements, Easter eggs, and more!

Ready to Swipe Right?

Wishlist MILF LOVE - Spa Date now, and prepare for the steamiest spa trip of your life.

data.short_description: Horny MILFs in your area? More likely than you think! Join the hottest dating app, score a spicy match, and dive into a steamy adventure with Selena, your favorite futanari bombshell.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
